creator: invis@visi.com
text:
In the hier(7) man page, there is an entry with "preserve", and
the next line made of question marks. This seems out of place considering
that there is already an entry explaining the /var/preserve directory.i
Furthermore, the preserve directory is not listed in alphabetical order.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Load up the hier(7) man page and search for "preserve".
